reviews.comment:
Excelente atencion! La unica en la zona que tenia todos los servicion que fui a buscar

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service! The only one in the area that had all the services I was looking for

reviews.comment:
Lentisimos atendiendo. Además me cargaron 3/4 de tanque porque el piso está inclinado. Tuve que ir a la Axión que está a 3 cuadras para llenar el tanque y entraron $900 más de nafta. Un desastre, evitar.

(Translated by Google)
Extremely slow service. They also filled my tank with three-quarters of the fuel because the floor is sloping. I had to go to the Axión station, three blocks away, to fill up, and they added $900 worth of gas. A disaster, avoid it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzbGVqRWpnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Un poco recargado de gente todo el tiempo. Y el bar es algo pobre. Pero la atención es buena.

(Translated by Google)
It's a bit crowded all the time. And the bar is rather basic. But the service is good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzNVpyX2FBEAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
This is the place I go to; they always find a solution. Impeccable.

reviews.comment:
Pasamos a Cargar nafta y vimos la.opción de comida por peso . Compramos y para mi gusto no estaba rico los sabores.  Pero es cuestión de gustos.  Sin desmerecer

(Translated by Google)
We stopped to fill up with gas and saw the option to buy food by weight. We bought some, and to my taste, the flavors weren't great. But it's a matter of taste. No offense intended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzeGFtTmdnRRAB
